sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69698" key="nannaristh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νανναρ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n69698.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prodigal</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ναναρ</itype>- cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
